posts.author: Capt_Cool
posts.text: NAZARA Q4/FY26 Review The Good: Real operating leverage is kicking in. Core gaming EBITDA jumped 66% in FY26, with Q4 margins hitting ~19.5%. Gaming is now 90% of EBITDA as the pivot to a high-margin IP platform takes shape. The Bad: The numbers are an accounting mess. Headline PAT (~₹819Cr) is heavily distorted by ₹914Cr impairments, fair-value gains, and other income. Valuation: While the reported P/E looks reasonable, the “clean” economic P/E is far higher. You’re paying for a high price for growth now Holding as a high-beta satellite with genuine 10x optionality, will add only on meaningfu…

posts.author: Capt_Cool
posts.text: NEULANDLAB Q4/FY26 Review The Good: A statement quarter! Q4 PAT skyrocketed ~7x YoY to ₹213Cr, with EBITDA margins hitting a massive 40.5%. FY26 ROCE expanded to ~26% as the CMS/CDMO engine fires on all cylinders. The Bad: This business is heavily lumpy, do NOT annualize those Q4 margins! It remains highly capital-intensive with ₹397Cr in FY26 capex and 137 working capital days. Cash generation requires heavy reinvestment. As Management mentioned themselves compare to Q424 base not to previous year (Low year) Valuation: Priced for perfection at ~58x P/E. You are paying a premium, Divi’s-like m…
